MINISTRY OF WATER RESOURCES NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 22nd February, 2013 S.O. 436(E).—Whereas, the Vansadhara Water Disputes Tribunal (hereinafter referred to as the said Tribunal) was constituted on the 24th February, 2010 vide Notification number S.O. 465(E) dated the 24th February, 2010, published in Part II, Section 3, Sub- section (ii) of Gazette of India, Extraordinary, dated the 24th February, 2010 under Section 4 of the Inter-State River Water Disputes Act, 1956 (33 of 1956) for the adjudication of the water disputes regarding the Inter-State river Vansadhara, and river valley thereof; And whereas, the said Tribunal is required to submit its report and decision as required under sub-section (2) of Section 5 of the said Act within a period of three years i.e. on or before the 23rd February, 2013; And whereas, due to unavoidable reasons, the said Tribunal could not submit its report within the said period of three years; And whereas the said Tribunal has requested the Central Government to extend the period of submission of report and decision; And whereas, in accordance with the proviso to sub-section (2) of Section 5 of the said Act, the Central Govern- ment may extend the period for a further period not exceeding one year; Now, therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by proviso to sub-section (2) of Section 5 of the said Act, the Central Government hereby extends the period of submission of report and decision by the Vansadhara Water Disputes Tribunal for a further period of one year with effect from the 24th February, 2013. [F. No. 5/2/2006-BM] N. S. SAMANT, Jt. Secy. (A & PP) -- 2 of 2 --
